description: Claude MCP server configuration for Udaan. These are REAL integrations available via Claude MAX subscription.

cloudflare-d1.purpose: Query and mutate the scheme database at edge (SQLite on Cloudflare)
real_usage: d1_database_query: SELECT * FROM schemes WHERE category = 'health' AND scope = 'central'
d1_database_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schemes GROUP BY category
d1_database_query: SELECT * FROM emergency_contacts WHERE state = 'UP' OR state = 'all'
d1_database_query: SELECT s.* FROM schemes s WHERE json_extract(s.eligibility, '$.incomeBrackets') LIKE '%BPL%'

cloudflare-kv.purpose: Globally replicated key-value store for pre-computed data
real_usage: kv_namespace_get: bloom:{profileHash} -> serialized bloom filter for O(1) eligibility pre-check
kv_namespace_get: geo:{geohash5} -> peer bucket IDs for locality-sensitive matching
kv_namespace_get: i18n:{locale}:{key} -> individual string lookup (fallback when client cache misses)
cloudflare-kv.data_flow: Build scripts pre-compute bloom filters and geo buckets, upload to KV. Workers read at request time. O(1) reads.

cloudflare-r2.purpose: Object storage for offline bundles and data snapshots (zero egress cost)
real_usage: r2_bucket_get: /data-snapshots/schemes-latest.json -> full scheme DB for client offline sync
r2_bucket_create: upload new offline bundle after scheme data update
cloudflare-r2.data_flow: Scheduled tasks rebuild offline bundles. Service worker fetches from R2 on first install. RxDB syncs delta updates.

setup_steps: 2. Create D1 database: use mcp__claude_ai_Cloudflare_Developer_Platform__d1_database_create with name 'udaan-schemes'
3. Run schema: use mcp__claude_ai_Cloudflare_Developer_Platform__d1_database_query with SQL from scripts/d1-schema.sql
4. Seed data: run 'bun scripts/seed-d1.ts' and execute output via d1_database_query
6. Create R2 bucket: use mcp__claude_ai_Cloudflare_Developer_Platform__r2_bucket_create with name 'udaan-assets'
7. Update wrangler.toml with real database_id, KV id from steps above
